title: En Kanmani Unna Pakkama Album Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
en kanmani unna parkaama
unna parthathum uyir seraama
ada naanumthaan inga vazhaama
kedanthen

unna parthathum vizhi
fuse poga.
ada naanumthaan inga
loose aaga.
ada neeyumthaan
vittu pogaatha.
penne

palanaalu kanvil naanum
oru maathiri unna paarthen
kanmoodi thirakkum podhu
neeyum engo poniyede

en nilavu engae
adhi veezhnthathe
en iravu engo adhu
ponathe.

en imaigal adhu
engo theduthe
en imaigal athai
ingu theduthe.
adhu vidiyum varai
engo ponathe

oru naal unnai paarthenadi
en kadhal unnai serthu vaika
...

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

enrichedMetadata.summary: The song En Kanmani Unna Pakkama beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth. The song conveys the essence of cherishing moments spent with a loved one, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. It serves as a reminder of the beauty and complexity of relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Kanmani Unna Pakkama is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of longing and love. The soothing lyrics and heartfelt emotions resonate deeply, making it a perfect listen for romantic moments. Experience the magic of this song that speaks to the soul and evokes cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: My dear, I can't see you, even seeing you doesn't bring life to me, I have come to live here without you.
Seeing you makes my eyes lose focus. I too become loose here. You too can't leave me, girl.
For many days, I have seen you like this, when I open my eyes, you seem to have gone somewhere.
Where is my moon? It has fallen somewhere, where is my night? It has gone somewhere.
My dreams are searching for you somewhere, my dreams are looking for it here. It won't go away until dawn.
One day, I saw you, my love, to bring you into my life...
